{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322013330B06508015A579E54DFE3"}"},"total":1344},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7194369427927204612","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常棒！就是能不能是双男主的，多箭头的也可以啊！感觉黑羽跟任何人都能组成CP！！！","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":10,"text":"双男主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741144109E54DFE3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227194369427927204612%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227186889987638430775%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675069770,"group_id":"7186889987638430775","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便磕，无所谓，反正我也乱磕","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N130P+i9fEHVJLC3I5VYqntPHHzkEjIb4CBlOsLfkQvl","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"2665654740323211","user_name":"甜蜜暴击tmbj"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2665654740323211","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186889987638430775","book_info":{"abstract":"【偏女频！慎入！！】
我，一个看过1000多集柯南的魔术师，这辈子都没想到次元壁这么牢固的东西说破就破！破就破吧，其实也不是不能接受穿越这个事…穿成黑羽快斗……勉强也能接受。
但是啊！系统！基德他原本的挂呢？？！
系统：“滴，完成73原著剧情会随机掉落的呦亲～”
————你是怎么看待怪盗基德的呢？
工藤新一：我命中注定的宿敌。
白马探：唯一能扰乱我思绪的人。
安室透：（低头）（捂脸）往事不堪回首。
松田阵平：（挑眉）有点意思。
赤井秀一：抓了算了。
琴酒：当初是谁把这玩意招进组织的？？？？
ps.
